services/transaction-service/src/main/ja.general_idea: Integrate AI/ML fraud detection client to check transactions before processing.
services/transaction-service/src/main/ja.human_impl: Autowired FraudCheckClient and added performFraudCheck method to block or flag high-risk transactions.

services/transaction-service/src/main/ja.general_idea: Integrate blockchain client to record transaction hashes for immutability.
services/transaction-service/src/main/ja.human_impl: Autowired BlockchainClient and added logic to record transactions asynchronously and verify integrity.

services/transaction-service/src/main/ja.general_idea: Add SLF4J logger to track transaction lifecycle and error states.
services/transaction-service/src/main/ja.human_impl: Added LoggerFactory and logger instance to log warnings, info, and errors during processing.

services/transaction-service/src/main/ja.general_idea: Restructure createTransaction to include pre-processing checks and post-processing recording.
services/transaction-service/src/main/ja.human_impl: Modified createTransaction to execute fraud check, save to DB, then queue for blockchain recording.

services/transaction-service/src/main/ja.general_idea: Add method to verify transaction integrity against the blockchain ledger.
services/transaction-service/src/main/ja.human_impl: Added verifyTransactionIntegrity method that calls blockchainClient.verifyTransaction.

services/transaction-service/src/main/ja.general_idea: Add helper method to convert internal Transaction entity to Blockchain DTO format.
services/transaction-service/src/main/ja.human_impl: Added convertToBlockchainDTO method to map fields and metadata for blockchain submission.

services/transaction-service/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version from 3.1.5 to 3.5.0 to support Java 21 and access newer features.
Add Lombok as a provided dependency to reduce boilerplate code in the service.
Explicitly override the Jackson databind version to 2.17.0 to address security vulnerabilities.
Explicitly override the SnakeYAML version to 2.3 to address security vulnerabilities.
Explicitly override Logback core and classic versions to 1.5.3 to address security vulnerabilities.
Explicitly override the embedded Tomcat version to 10.1.20 to address security vulnerabilities.
Add Spring Boot Actuator starter to enable monitoring and metrics endpoints.
Add Spring Boot Validation starter to enable bean validation support.
Add Caffeine caching library to enable efficient in-memory caching.
Add OWASP Dependency Check Maven plugin to scan for vulnerable dependencies during the build.
Configure a Maven profile to enable dependency checking only when an NVD API key is present.

.gitignore.general_idea: Allow environment files within the services directory to be tracked despite the global .env ignore rule.
Allow specific SSL certificate and key files in the nginx infrastructure directory to be tracked despite the global ignore rule for keys and certs.

README.md.general_idea: Rename the project from AfriPay Universal to Eazepay and update all references to reflect the new identity.
README.md.human_impl: Changed title to '# Eazepay - Universal Payment Platform' and updated logo references.

README.md.general_idea: Add visual badges for license, docker, and microservices, along with key performance metrics to the header.
README.md.human_impl: Added shields.io badges and a 'Key Metrics' section with TPS and latency stats.

README.md.general_idea: Modernize the quick start section to use docker-compose and provide specific URLs for new portals.
README.md.human_impl: Replaced manual setup scripts with 'docker-compose up -d' and listed Admin/Superuser/Customer/Agent portal URLs.

README.md.general_idea: Replace the simple list of microservices with a detailed table including ports, descriptions, and current status.
README.md.human_impl: Created a markdown table listing services like Identity, Biometric, Transaction, etc., with status indicators.

README.md.general_idea: Add links to new documentation files such as deployment guides, architecture docs, and mobile app guides.
Document different deployment strategies including monolithic, distributed, and hybrid setups.
README.md.human_impl: Added a 'Deployment Scenarios' section with instructions for All-in-One, Distributed, and Hybrid deployments.

README.md.general_idea: Include instructions for building native iOS and Android apps using React Native.
README.md.human_impl: Added a 'Mobile App' section with npx react-native init commands and configuration steps.

README.md.general_idea: List specific security features implemented in the platform such as JWT, 2FA, and biometric encryption.
README.md.human_impl: Added a 'Security Features' section detailing JWT, 2FA, RBAC, and audit logging.

README.md.general_idea: Update the technology stack section to reflect current backend and frontend technologies.
README.md.human_impl: Listed Node.js, Python, Java, Go for backend and React, Vite, Zustand for frontend.

README.md.general_idea: Add a section detailing monitoring tools like Prometheus, Grafana, and Kibana with access URLs.
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Monitoring' section with URLs for Grafana, Prometheus, Kibana, and RabbitMQ.

README.md.general_idea: Provide commands for running tests for different services (Identity, Transaction, Biometric).
README.md.human_impl: Added 'Testing' section with npm test, gradlew test, and pytest commands.

README.md.general_idea: Include a snippet of the GitHub Actions workflow for CI/CD.
README.md.human_impl: Added a 'CI/CD' section with a sample deploy.yml workflow.

README.md.general_idea: Outline the project roadmap with phases for core services, enhanced features, scale, and expansion.
README.md.human_impl: Added a 'Roadmap' section with checkboxes for Phase 1 to Phase 4 features.

README.md.general_idea: Change the license from Proprietary to MIT.
README.md.human_impl: Updated the License section to state 'MIT License' and linked to the LICENSE file.

check-all.sh.general_idea: Add a runtime check to verify if the 'nc' (netcat) command is available before attempting to use it for port checking.
Implement a fallback mechanism using bash's built-in /dev/tcp feature to check port connectivity when netcat is not installed.
